popularStory.headline: Odo II (French: Eudes) (983 – 15 November 1037) was the count of Blois, Chartres, Châteaudun, Champagne, Beauvais, Tours,Troyes, Meaux
popularStory.description: Odo II (French: Eudes) (983 – 15 November 1037) was the count of Blois, Chartres, Châteaudun, Champagne, Beauvais and Tours from 1004 and count of Troyes (as Odo IV) and Meaux (as Odo I) from 1022. He …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes II le Champenois de Blois於0985年3月12日出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，他的父親Eudes Ier de Blois40歲，母親Berthe de Bourgogne17歲。他於1003年與Mathilde de Normandie結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1037年11月15日在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克享年52歲，埋葬在法國崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes II le Champenois de Blois于0985年3月12日出生在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，他的父亲Eudes Ier de Blois40岁，母亲Berthe de Bourgogne17岁。他于1003年与Mathilde de Normandie结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1037年11月15日在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克享年52岁，埋葬在法国崔英德-吉洛易圖爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille.
French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian and Slovenian Rudež: nickname derived from rud ‘red, reddish’, or, alternatively, from rud ‘curly’ (standard Slovenian rod; compare Rodes ). In Croatia, the surname is also found in the form Rudeš.

variants.name: Rodes
meanings: Catalan (Rodés): habitational name from any of several places called Rodés, mainly those in El Pallars and El Conflent districts, in northern Catalonia.
Catalan: variant of Roda , from Catalan rodes, plural of roda ‘wheel’.
English: variant of   Rhodes  . Compare   Rhode  .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Wondrous’ or ‘enlightenment’.
2  ♀ ‘Fine jade’.

nameMeanings.name: le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes II le Champenois de Blois was born on 12 March 0985, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, his father, Eudes Ier de Blois, was 40 and his mother, Berthe de Bourgogne, was 17. He married Mathilde de Normandie in 1003. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 15 November 1037, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, at the age of 52, and was buried in Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes II le Champenois de Blois est né le 12 mars 0985, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Eudes Ier de Blois, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Berthe de Bourgogne, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Mathilde de Normandie en 1003. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 novembre 1037, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes II le Champenois de Blois am 12. März 0985 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eudes Ier de Blois 40 und seine Mutter Berthe de Bourgogne 17. Er hat 1003 Mathilde de Normandie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. November 1037 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes II le Champenois de Blois è nato il il 12 marzo 0985 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, il suo padre, Eudes Ier de Blois, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Berthe de Bourgogne, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Mathilde de Normandie nel 1003. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 15 novembre 1037, nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eudes II le Champenois de Bloisが0985年3月12日にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Eudes Ier de Bloisは40歳，母Berthe de Bourgogneは17歳であった。1003年にMathilde de Normandieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1037年11月15日にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで52歳で死去し，フランスセントアインドレ-エト-ロイアートウルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eudes II le Champenois de Blois(이)가 0985년 3월 12일 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eudes Ier de Blois(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Berthe de Bourgogne(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1003년 Mathilde de Normandie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1037년 11월 15일 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세트르 인드레-트-로이르 토우르스에 묻혔다.

mn.12 March 0985–15 November 1037: 0985 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 12–1037 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 15

pt.12 March 0985–15 November 1037: 12 de março de 0985–15 de novembro de 1037
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes II le Champenois de Blois nasceu em 12 de março de 0985, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, seu pai, Eudes Ier de Blois, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Berthe de Bourgogne, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Mathilde de Normandie em 1003. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1037, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes II le Champenois de Blois родился 12 марта 0985 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, его отцу по имени Eudes Ier de Blois было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Berthe de Bourgogne, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathilde de Normandie в 1003 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 15 ноября 1037 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности тоурс, индре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция.

es.12 March 0985–15 November 1037: 12 de marzo de 0985–15 de noviembre de 1037
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudes II le Champenois de Blois nació el 12 de marzo de 0985, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, su papá, Eudes Ier de Blois, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Berthe de Bourgogne, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Mathilde de Normandie en 1003. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1037, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Tours, Indre-et-Loire, Centre, Francia.
